pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh which explicitly initializes this directory.
Counted the total number of test functions generated in setup_task.sh (6 in test_geo.py, 5 in test_wind.py, and 4 in test_fuel.py).
Verified in verifier.py, which asserts `passed = score >= 75`.

metadata_value: Wind effect sign error (Headwind adds speed)
Fuel time unit error (Minutes vs Hours)
verified_value: Wind effect sign error (Headwind adds speed)
Fuel time unit error (Minutes vs Hours)
pi_items.source: Inspected setup_task.sh which dynamically creates geo.py, wind.py, and fuel.py containing exactly these four explicitly labeled bugs.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment and data are entirely synthetic. The project directory is verified to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/flight_planner. The generated test suite contains exactly 15 tests. The scoring threshold for passing is confirmed as 75 out of 100 in the verifier. The codebase contains four verified bugs: a distance unit error using KM instead of NM, a bearing quadrant error using atan instead of atan2, a wind effect sign error that adds headwind instead of subtracting it, and a fuel time unit error that multiplies by minutes instead of converting to hours.
